# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a Helm chart that includes an Ingress resource for our application. Configure the ingress to accept traffic from any hostname for flexibility across different environments (dev, staging, prod). We'll configure TLS certificates later when we move to production.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v2
name: my-chart
version: 0.1.0

description: A Helm chart for Kubernetes

type: application
appVersion: 1.0.0

values:
  ingress:
    enabled: true
    hosts:
      - host: *
        paths:
          - /

  service:
    type: ClusterIP

---

kind: Ingress
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
metadata:
  name: {{ include "my-chart.fullname" . }}
  annotations:
    kubernetes.io/ingress.class: nginx
    nginx.org/client-max-body-size: 10m

spec:
  rules:
  - host: {{ $host := .Values.ingress.hosts | first . }}
    http:
      paths:
      - pathType: Prefix
        path: "/"
        backend:
          service:
            name: {{ include "my-chart.fullname" . }}
            port:
              number: {{ .Values.service.port }}
